title: Tojis Attire
wikitext:
[]: Toji's Attire             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 02, 2009 12:38 pm Some friends and I had a small Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0 viewing last night, and a question was posed that I've been curious about, but have never been able to answer. And to my knowledge, a definitive answer has never been issued. Why does Toji always wear a black track suit? Quite often, people refer to it as his "gym uniform", however, he has been shown in his gym uniform with everyone else, which doesn't resemble his track suit in the slightest. Also, some production illustrations show us that he wears a tank top underneath, again, unrelated to the gym uniform. His track suit can't possibly be his winter uniform, as he is shown in his winter uniform in his student formal picture. And it's not like he doesn't have a standard school uniform, as there has been at least one episode where he sports the usual outfit just like Shinji and Kensuke. But generally, he wears the same track suit all the time, and in standard anime fashion, he even sports it when he's not even at school. The only other detail I can currently glean from the show or the production details is that in the original Sadamoto illustration of him, his outfit has an additional detail on the chest, which I am totally unfamiliar with. The only obvious thing that can be pulled from his attire is that it is visually similar to and foreshadows his selection as the pilot of Eva Unit 03. In summary, I'm still confused, and have no clue. Can we put our heads together, and figure out what the hell this track suit that Toji wears is, and what it means, if anything?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:07 pm I'm probably making this up, but was it mentioned that he decides to wear that instead of the school uniform?

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:45 pm A Fila sport jacket, as we see in episode 4 ;)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:54 pm Axell wrote: I'm probably making this up, but was it mentioned that he decides to wear that instead of the school uniform?

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:28 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Is there a particular comment that I'm missing? It's more than just a sport jacket, the pants are non-standard, as is the tank top underneath.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:32 pm It's just what he likes to wear, brah.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:39 pm ath wrote: Fila

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Aug 02, 2009 2:48 pm i always wondered this myself. When you go back and re watch eva, the episode were he does wear his standard uniform stands out like sore thumb. i think the simple explanation to this is just to give a little visual variety, i mean thats the only reason they gave Rei blue hair and red eyes. No real thought went behind it before they went ahead and done it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 02, 2009 3:12 pm skikes wrote: i mean [visual variety is] the only reason they gave Rei blue hair and red eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Aug 02, 2009 4:00 pm He's a jock.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:42 pm Allemann wrote: He's a jock.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sun Aug 02, 2009 11:27 pm How funny, i typed basketball tracksuit into google and look what came up... guess it was a simple question after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:51 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: Allemann wrote: He's a jock.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:13 am Allemann wrote: He's a jock.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:27 am The Goose wrote: Allemann wrote: He's a jock.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:42 am Allemann wrote: And he's thick as shit. Doesn't get that Hikari has a thing for him.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:44 am Sachi_13 wrote: Allemann wrote: And he's thick as shit. Doesn't get that Hikari has a thing for him.

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:48 am It's a kind of school uniform. my school has something similar, and i've seen it in anime's before. for instance if anyones seen TMOHS, in the sport episode the wear red and blue tracksuits before the game and real sport uniforms after.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Mon Aug 03, 2009 4:01 am ...Could it be from his previous school in Kansai? *is bricked* I get the impression the Tokyo-3 school wasn't too strict on uniform regulations, but I can't pinpoint where I got that (maybe I just made it up... > <)

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:21 pm Because Toji is a bad ass who doesn't play by the rules.

[]: Toji's Attire             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 02, 2009 12:38 pm Some friends and I had a small Rebuild of Evangelion 1.0 viewing last night, and a question was posed that I've been curious about, but have never been able to answer. And to my knowledge, a definitive answer has never been issued. Why does Toji always wear a black track suit? Quite often, people refer to it as his "gym uniform", however, he has been shown in his gym uniform with everyone else, which doesn't resemble his track suit in the slightest. Also, some production illustrations show us that he wears a tank top underneath, again, unrelated to the gym uniform. His track suit can't possibly be his winter uniform, as he is shown in his winter uniform in his student formal picture. And it's not like he doesn't have a standard school uniform, as there has been at least one episode where he sports the usual outfit just like Shinji and Kensuke. But generally, he wears the same track suit all the time, and in standard anime fashion, he even sports it when he's not even at school. The only other detail I can currently glean from the show or the production details is that in the original Sadamoto illustration of him, his outfit has an additional detail on the chest, which I am totally unfamiliar with. The only obvious thing that can be pulled from his attire is that it is visually similar to and foreshadows his selection as the pilot of Eva Unit 03. In summary, I'm still confused, and have no clue. Can we put our heads together, and figure out what the hell this track suit that Toji wears is, and what it means, if anything?
